title: VeloraOS 1.10.9 - HTTPS & Trusted Local PWA
releaseNotes: Adds HTTPS by default using a persistent VeloraOS Local CA and per-device certificate.
Moves the application backend to localhost and serves the full VeloraOS site through Nginx on HTTPS port 443.
Redirects HTTP port 80 and historical VeloraOS port 8099 to HTTPS for existing bookmarks and upgraded systems.
Adds a downloadable VeloraOS Local CA certificate so phones and computers can trust the appliance once for PWA installation.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, installed models, notifications, licensing, device identity, TLS identity and secure rollback updates.
